pi_items.source: Honda official 2019 Civic maintenance schedule - oil changes and tire rotations occur at 7,500 mile intervals
Honda official maintenance schedule includes brake inspection at 15,000 miles
Honda air filter replacement interval: 15,000 to 30,000 miles or once per year per Honda Service guidelines
Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 14 (Current Mileage: 47500) and verifier.py line 35 (CURRENT_MILEAGE = 47500)
Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 21: '2023-02-14,Oil Change,,45,,'. The mileage column (C) is empty.
Sum of costs from CSV: 45+30+45+120+45+35+50+25+50+35 = $480. Verified by verifier.py line 362.
Counted from setup_task.sh lines 17-26: 10 maintenance entries plus 1 missing data entry

pi_items.verified_value: Plausible scenario - 47,500 miles on a 2019 vehicle (5-6 years old) is realistic

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic maintenance data hardcoded in the setup script. Current mileage is 47,500 miles. Service intervals specified are: Oil Change 5,000 miles (contradicts Honda's official 7,500 miles), Tire Rotation 7,500 miles (verified), Brake Inspection 15,000 miles (verified), Air Filter 20,000 miles (unverified - Honda recommends 15,000-30,000). Missing mileage data in row 8 (2023-02-14 Oil Change) should be interpolated between 32,000-38,000 miles. Total maintenance costs sum to $480. At least one service shows as overdue (negative miles until next service) with current formulas.
